message:
fix: address review issues in LLM progress events and web UI

- Emit llm_end on abort/error to prevent stuck "Calling LLM" state
- Handle error stream events in completeWithStreaming
- Rename tokens_so_far -> chunks_so_far (counts chunks, not tokens)
- Count reasoning_delta events for thinking-enabled agents
- Fix inaccurate completeWithStreaming docstring
- Add abort-path test coverage
- Handle interrupted events in buildAgentStats

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
